text:
CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 1 = Coinsurance 
2 = Copayment 

COMMENT: This variable applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. The coverage gap is technically 
referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit. 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are
